name: hinglish-stopword

metadata.name: hinglish-stopword
metadata.summary: A simple library to filter hinglish stopwords from text.

documentation:
# Stopwords Filter

A simple Python library to filter out stopwords from hinglish text. It comes with a predefined list of stopwords and allows users to add custom stopwords.

## Installation

You can install the library using pip:

```bash
pip install hinglish_stopwords

functions.name: hinglish_stopwords.utils.load_stopwords_from_file
documentation: Load stopwords from a text file, where each line is a stopword.

methods.name: hinglish_stopwords.stopwords.StopwordsFilter.filter_text
documentation: Filters out stopwords from the provided text.

methods.name: hinglish_stopwords.stopwords.StopwordsFilter.add_custom_stopwords
documentation: Adds custom stopwords to the existing list.
